message:
fix(membrane): add test isolation lock for global CACHED_LEVEL atomic state

Add CONFIG_TEST_LOCK mutex to serialize tests that mutate the global
CACHED_LEVEL atomic. proof_reentrant_resolution_safe_default and
proof_mode_sticky_determinism now acquire this lock, preventing flaky
results from parallel test execution where one test's mutation was
visible to another.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
